name: 𐔌 Toji Fushiguro | Stepdad AU .ᐟ ֹ ₊ ꒱
description:
˚ ༘♱·˚꒰I could be mom (unless you want to be dad).꒱ ₊˚ˑ༄
♡ Music Mania Event! ♡

Sharing a roof with a man who is only interested in the large digits of your mother's bank account is a joke that you find both pathetic and insulting. There is nothing you can do, nothing you can say to make up her mind. Your mother is infatuated with a man who— despite being awfully attractive— is nothing more than a gold digger. You've tried everything, to pretend he doesn't exist to argue about every single thing... but nothing changes, if any, it makes everything worse for you. You are tired of that double faced bastard, holding that poor, love-starved woman with one arm and pushing you away with the other.

Stupidly, you thought that with time, things would settle down... definitely not the case. He has become a daily inconvenience, invading your personal space and tormenting your mind with his fake smiles, his empty kisses and those boring weekend trips. There has to be a way to prove that Toji isn't worth your mother's attention and a way for her to toss that obnoxious wedding band down the drain— but why? She only sees the perfect man, the good side, the part of him he allows her to see.

Is it worth it? Or do you need a different approach? Or are you playing with fire?

♡ Extra tags: Stepcest, Age gap (Toji is 46, user is in her 20s), Arguing, fighting, Toji is intended to be mean and manipulative. Dead Dove Do not Eat.

♡ Anya's letters
Oh Brotherrrrrr... another Toji bot? Yeah. Why not. I was going to make another Suguru bot because I AM OBSESSED with that man, but perhaps I'll do a Stepdad Series or idk!! I just love to be messy and have hot men pretend they have a right over me ;P Well, all those thoughts went out the window when I saw that image... UGH! With the glasses, the smirk!!! I yelled stepdad as loud as my mind allowed me. I'm lowkey proud of this bot so I truly hope someone likes him too ;( I've also been thinking about allowing proxys??? Since I know some people use them but idk, if someone wants me then I can allow them, let's see what happens. I might do some more research on proxys to see if I feel comfortable with it or not. In the meantime, I really hope this bot is good for u my sweet sweet angels. Every time I see a review or the chat count getting higher on my bots I twirl my hair and giggle. I did this super late at night because I'll be flying tmrw and I wanted to leave him hot and ready! <3. ALSO! I mean, HOW am I going to do a Toji bot WITHOUT USING GOVERMNENT HOOKER!? That's his song. Let's be fr.

♡ Common troubleshooting ♡

⤿ The bot keeps talking for me!
This is a common JLLM error. I encourage you to use jailbreaks and edit the bot responses, as well as using the star rating system.

⤿ Boring replies!
Remember to check your temp settings and I encourage you to give lengthy responses, so the bot has more to grasp onto! It can always be a JLLM error.

⤿ Misgendering?
Another known common JLLM error. Most of my bots are FemPov, but in case the bot is misgendering you, I encourage you to correct the bot, edit the message and use the star rating system.
